Article Title: Who is Arnav Paparkar? Meet the first Indian in 36 years to reach Wimbledon boys' singles quarterfinals
Article Text:
Arnav Paparkar (Image credit: Instagram)

Who is Arnav Paparkar ?



Journey to Wimbledon success



Big wins at Wimbledon



Win against Tabata



NEW DELHI: The question - "Who is Arnav Paparkar?" - quickly started trending on social media after the young Indian tennis player created history at Wimbledon . Paparkar became the first Indian in 36 years to reach the boys' singles quarterfinals at the prestigious tournament. The 18-year-old defeated Japan's Ryo Tabata 6-2, 6-1 in just 52 minutes on Wednesday to book his place in the last eight. He is the first Indian to achieve the feat since Leander Paes, who went on to win the junior Wimbledon title in 1990.With a place in the Wimbledon boys' singles quarterfinals already secured, Paparkar has joined an elite list of Indian players that includes Leander Paes, Ramanathan Krishnan and Ramesh Krishnan. He is also the first Indian since Yuki Bhambri's 2009 US Open campaign to reach the quarterfinals of a junior Grand Slam.Paparkar will now take on American qualifier Jordan Lee in the quarterfinals.Paparkar is an 18-year-old tennis player from Pune and is currently ranked World No. 19 in the ITF junior rankings.Standing just over six feet tall, Paparkar trains at the Hemant Bendre Tennis Academy under coach Prosonjit Paul.He also spends time training at the Soto Academy in Spain under coach Nigel Beavers.Paparkar is supported by the Maharashtra State Lawn Tennis Association (MSLTA), the Mahatennis Foundation, the Maharashtra government's "Mission Lakshyvedh" initiative and corporate sponsor Aryan Pumps.Paparkar's first major breakthrough came in 2023 when he won the Australian Open Under-14 Asia-Pacific Elite Trophy in Melbourne. Later that year, he became the National Under-16 champion in Kolhapur after entering the tournament as a wildcard qualifier.He made his ATP Challenger debut on his 16th birthday in 2024 after receiving a wildcard entry.In 2025, he won his first major international junior titles at the ITF J60 Manama in Bahrain and the J200 Kuala Lumpur.Earlier this year, he became the AITA Boys Under-18 National No. 1 and held the top spot for 21 consecutive weeks. He also reached the third round of the 2026 Roland Garros Junior Championships, a performance that helped him break into the world's top 20.Paparkar announced himself at Wimbledon with a stunning 6-2, 6-3 victory over junior World No. 3 Keaton Hance of the United States in the second round.Against Hance, he served six aces, saved every breakpoint he faced and conceded only 18 points on serve to register the biggest win of his career.He followed it up with another dominant performance against Tabata, firing eight aces and winning 23 of his 25 first-serve points. His fastest serve touched 208 km/h, while his average first-serve speed was 196 km/h.Paparkar's win over Tabata was extra special because the Japanese player had beaten him twice before. One of those defeats came after Paparkar had led 5-2 in the deciding set and held five match points."That match was in my head. I was like, I cannot lose like that again. I'm much better now mentally, a lot calmer… I tell myself, it's ok, it's just a tennis match," a beaming Paparkar told TOI.Paparkar also noticed that Tabata was struggling physically during the match but stayed focused on his own game."I realised that he was struggling with his serve, but also sometimes players feel better in the course of a match, so I just was focussed on what I could do in the match," he added.Paparkar credits coach Hemant Bendre for improving one of the strongest parts of his game by changing his service action."If you see now my swing is slower and fuller, my coach told me in April that it was better to work on that now as it would prevent injuries," he said."It has given me a better rhythm and that has led to more consistency," he said.
Article Summary: Arnav paparkar became the first indian in 36 years to reach the boys' singles quarterfinals at wimbledon. The 18-year-old defeated japan's ryo tabata 6-2, 6-1 in just 52 minutes on wednesday to book his place in the last eight. He is currently ranked world no. 19 in the itf junior rankings.

Article Title: Ex-Navy chief, Niti VC were part of Padma jury
Article Text:
Padma Awards 2026 ceremony

NEW DELHI: Former Chief of Naval Staff R Hari Kumar, Niti Aayog vice-chairman Ashok Lahiri, ex-hockey player P R Sreejesh, lyricist Prasoon Joshi, cardiac surgeon Devi Shetty, actor Chandra Prakash Dwivedi who played the lead role in 'Chanakya' TV series and politicians Vinay Sahastrabuddhe and Bhartruhari Mahtab were part of the 30-member Padma Awards selection committee for the year 2026, reports Bharti Jain.The composition of the committee is made public by home ministry only after conclusion of the civil investiture ceremony, where the President confers the awards on the recipients to honour their contribution to various fields and disciplines. A govt official said the delayed disclosure is meant to shield the members of the committee from any pulls and pressures from those submitting recommendations for the awards.
Article Summary: Former chief of naval staff r hari kumar, niti aayog vice-chairman ashok lahiri, ex-hockey player p r sreejesh, lyricist prasoon joshi, cardiac surgeon devi shetty, actor chandra prakash dwivedi were part of the 30-member committee.

Article Title: Tom Brady shuts down ‘dumb’ Bill Belichick narrative with unfiltered take on Patriots legacy debate: "It’s a dumb analogy"
Article Text:
Tom Brady reveals the real reason the Brady vs Belichick argument never made sense to him (Getty Images)

Why did Tom Brady call the Bill Belichick comparison "dumb"?

For years, one question has followed the end of the New England Patriots dynasty. Was the team's unprecedented success built more on Tom Brady's brilliance or Bill Belichick's coaching? The debate only intensified after Brady won a Super Bowl in his first season with the Tampa Bay Buccaneers while Belichick struggled to recreate the same level of success in New England. Brady has now addressed that discussion directly, making it clear he does not believe either side deserves sole credit for what the Patriots achieved over two decades.Speaking on the latest episode of the "New Heights" podcast with Travis and Jason Kelce, Tom Brady dismissed the long-running argument that pits him against his former head coach. Instead of choosing sides, the seven-time Super Bowl champion explained why he believes the comparison misses the point.“I think he’s the greatest head coach in terms of preparing a team to win,” TB12 said of Bill Belichick on Wednesday.“There was nobody better. It was my privilege to play for him as his quarterback. There’s no coach I’d rather choose, and it’s a dumb analogy. It’s like, what’s more important, the left tackle or the center?” he added.Brady's explanation went beyond simple praise. He pointed to the different responsibilities carried by a head coach and a quarterback throughout an NFL season.According to him, Bill Belichick's work begins long before kickoff, spending the week preparing every detail that gives a team its best chance to win. On game day, the quarterback takes over by making decisions on the field and executing the plan.That distinction, Brady argued, is exactly why separating one person's contribution from another does not reflect how championship teams are built. Success comes from every role functioning together, not from one individual carrying the entire organization.The discussion has lingered since Brady left New England in 2020. His immediate championship run in Tampa Bay fueled claims that he had been the true engine behind the Patriots' dynasty. At the same time, Belichick managed just one winning season between 2020 and 2023, leading critics to question whether he could thrive without a Hall of Fame quarterback.Tom Brady, however, rejected that narrative once again while reflecting on the partnership that defined one of the NFL's greatest eras.“There’s no way I could have been the player I was without him. I think we pushed each other to get the best out of each other,” Brady said while reflecting on the partnership that helped build the Patriots’ dynasty.Bill Belichick and the Patriots agreed to part ways in January 2024, ending a historic chapter in franchise history. After spending roughly a year away from coaching, he accepted the head coaching job at the University of North Carolina in December 2024. He now begins a new challenge in college football, aiming to build the ACC program into a national contender while his NFL legacy continues to spark discussion.
Article Summary: Tom brady says the comparison between him and bill belichick is 'dumb' the seven-time super bowl champion believes the comparison misses the point. Brady believes belichick is the best head coach in the nfl. He also believes that neither he nor belichick deserve sole credit for the patriots' success.

Article Title: Blake Lively reportedly did not expect a lot from Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce as their wedding sparked chaos
Article Text:
Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce just had the wedding of the year as 1000 high profile guests belonging to Hollywood and the sports world lined up to watch the pop star walk down the aisle, sparking chaos among milllions. While the wedding had brought New York City to a standstill, it seems Blake Lively might not have been that disappointed with not being invited.

Blake Lively might have predicted to be not invited to Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce’s wedding

Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce remain distant as they spark outrage for not inviting Blake Lively and Ryan reynolds



Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce just had the wedding of the year as 1000 high profile guests belonging to Hollywood and the sports world lined up to watch the pop star walk down the aisle. While the wedding had brought New York City to a standstill, it seems Blake Lively might not have been that disappointed with not being invited.A few days ago, as per US Weekly, a source revealed that Blake Lively reportedly had expected to be not invited.The source said, “It would be a media frenzy…She also understands that she and Taylor don’t have the same level of friendship they once had.”The source added, “She isn’t upset about not being invited, but of course, she would love to be there to support her and Travis.”As per US Weekly, the source continued, “They haven’t been in touch in several months, and their last correspondence was only a few casual texts back and forth. That is the extent of their friendship.”Back on last Friday, as millions around the world lined up outside New York City’s Madison Square Garden to watch Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce get married, Blake Lively and Ryan Reynolds were spotted heading out of the city.In pictures that sparked chaos, Blake Lively and Ryan Reynolds were spotted wearing normal everyday clothes as they headed out of the city along with their children to celebrate 4th of July privately.However, neither Taylor Swift nor Blake Lively has reacted to the speculations yet as the billionaire pop star focuses on her newly wed life with Travis Kelce, ahead of the new season.In the last few days, many have criticised the “Life of a Showgirl” artist Taylor Swift for deciding to keep Blake Lively and Ryan Reynolds away from her high profile wedding to Travis Kelce.For the unversed, Taylor Swift is Blake Lively and Ryan Reynolds’ daughters’ godmother and has been best friends with the Hollywood power couple.Blake Lively had also been a strong source of support and strength to Taylor Swift as she experienced challenging times in her career.But it seems the billionaire pop star has moved on in her life and is only close to a selected group of friends, including supermodel Gigi Hadid and Rare Beauty founder and pop star Selena Gomez.For now, all eyes remain on what Taylor Swift chooses to do next in her life concerning her friendship with Blake Lively as billions across the world wait for her wedding pictures to be released.
Article Summary: Taylor swift and travis kelce just had the wedding of the year as 1000 high profile guests belonging to hollywood and the sports world lined up to watch the pop star walk down the aisle. While the wedding had brought new york city to a standstill, it seems blake lively might not have been that disappointed with not being invited.

Article Title: History at Wimbledon: Arnav Paparkar becomes first Indian in 36 years to reach boys' singles quarter-finals since Leander Paes
Article Text:
Arnav Vijay Paparkar plays a backhand against Joshua Craze of Great Britain during their Boys' Singles first round match on day six of The Championships Wimbledon 2026 on July 04, 2026 in London, England. (Photo/Getty)

Arnav Paparkar took the quieter route. He climbed the ladder one step at a time, starting with lower-level international tournaments in India before moving through the Asian circuit and eventually into the higher levels. The 18-year-old began playing Grand Slam junior events this year, in his final season in the category, and improved with each tournament. On Wednesday, that steady rise reached a landmark moment as Paparkar became the first Indian in 36 years to reach the Wimbledon boys’ singles quarter-finals, since Leander Paes lifted the title in 1990.The 6ft 1 inch Indian, ranked No. 19 in the junior rankings, dispatched Japan’s Ryo Tabata 6-2, 6-1 in 52 minutes to book his place in the quarter-finals, where he will face American qualifier Jordan Lee. Paparkar will be looking to turn the tide against Lee, having lost both of their previous meetings, including their most recent clash at the J300 Roehampton in June.Yuki Bhambri, who won the junior Australian Open in 2009, reached the US Open quarterfinals that same year and remains the last Indian before Paparkar to reach a junior Grand Slam quarter-final.Tabata, who had beaten Paparkar twice before, including once after the Indian had led 5-2 in the deciding set and held five match points, was not at his best physically.As the match wore on, he struggled with his serve and eventually stopped extending himself in his court coverage.“That match was in my head. I was like, I cannot lose like that again. I’m much better now mentally, a lot calmer… I tell myself, it’s ok, it’s just a tennis match,” a beaming Paparkar said.Paparkar was aware of the Japanese player’s physical struggles.“I realised that he was struggling with his serve, but also sometimes players feel better in the course of a match, so I just was focussed on what I could do in the match,” he added.Paparkar produced another impressive serving display, firing eight aces and winning 23 of 25 points on his first serve. His fastest delivery of the day came at 208 km/h in the second set, while the average speed of his first serves was 196 km/h.The Indian has two training bases, at home in Pune, where he works with Hemant Bendre, and at the Soto Academy in Spain, where he trains under Nigel Beavers. Paparkar credits Bendre with helping improve his serve by tweaking his action.“If you see now my swing is slower and fuller, my coach told me in April that it was better to work on that now as it would prevent injuries,” he said. “It has given me a better rhythm and that has led to more consistency.”
Article Summary: Arnav paparkar is the first indian in 36 years to reach the wimbledon boys' singles quarter-finals, since leander paes lifted the title in 1990. The 6ft 1 inch indian, ranked no. 19 in the junior rankings, dispatched japan’s ryo tabata 6-2, 6-1 in 52 minutes. The 18-year-old began playing grand slam junior events this year.

Article Title: Cristiano Ronaldo's two-word message after Portugal's FIFA World Cup 2026 exit
Article Text:
Cristiano Ronaldo (AP Photo)

Ronaldo's emotional message



A World Cup journey comes to an end



Ronaldo's records in his final World Cup



How Portugal's campaign unfolded



NEW DELHI: Cristiano Ronaldo shared an emotional message after Portugal's FIFA World Cup 2026 campaign came to an end with a heartbreaking Round of 16 defeat to Spain.The Portuguese captain had already announced before the Spain match that this would be his final FIFA World Cup . Portugal suffered a late 2-1 defeat after Mikel Merino scored the winner. Ronaldo and Bruno Fernandes both missed chances as Portugal's dream of lifting the trophy came to an end. The 41-year-old left the field in tears after what turned out to be his last World Cup match.After the defeat, Ronaldo posted a picture of the Portugal team in a huddle on Instagram with a simple two-word message: "Portugal Sempre", which translates to "Portugal Forever".Despite confirming that this was his last World Cup, Ronaldo did not reveal whether he would retire from international football. Speaking after the match, he said he would not take any "rash decisions" about his future with Portugal.Ronaldo's World Cup journey began in 2006, when Portugal finished fourth. The team reached the Round of 16 in 2010, exited in the group stage in 2014, and suffered another Round of 16 exit in 2018. In 2022, Portugal reached the quarterfinals before being knocked out. That tournament also saw Lionel Messi lead Argentina to the title.Ronaldo finishes his FIFA World Cup career with 27 matches, the second-highest by any player, and 11 goals. He scored three goals in five matches during the 2026 edition but was unable to guide Portugal beyond the Round of 16.His final World Cup also ended with an unwanted record. Ronaldo attempted 17 shots during the tournament without creating a single chance for a teammate, the most by any player in a FIFA World Cup.The tournament, jointly hosted by the USA, Canada and Mexico, also saw Ronaldo add more milestones to his remarkable career.In Portugal's 2-1 Round of 32 win over Croatia, Ronaldo became the first player in history to appear in a FIFA World Cup knockout match at the age of 41 or older. The match also featured another veteran, Luka Modric, making it the first World Cup game with two outfield players aged 40 or above.Ronaldo also became the oldest goalscorer in World Cup knockout history at 41 years and 147 days. It was also his first-ever goal in a World Cup knockout match.Portugal opened their campaign with a disappointing 1-1 draw against DR Congo, with Ronaldo struggling to make an impact.He bounced back in style against Uzbekistan, scoring twice in Portugal's 5-0 victory. Nuno Mendes and Rafael Leao were also on target, while an own goal by Uzbekistan goalkeeper Abduvohid Nematov completed the scoring.The two goals helped Ronaldo become Portugal's all-time leading scorer in FIFA World Cup history with 10 goals, moving past Eusebio's tally of nine. He also became the first player to score in six different FIFA World Cup tournaments, ending a 10-match goal drought in major international competitions.Portugal finished the group stage with a goalless draw against Colombia before defeating Croatia in the Round of 32. However, their campaign ended in the next round with the painful defeat to Spain, bringing Ronaldo's World Cup journey to a close.
Article Summary: Portugal lost 2-1 to spain in the round of 16 of the fifa world cup 2026. Cristiano ronaldo posted an emotional message on instagram after the match. The 41-year-old had already confirmed that this would be his final world cup. He did not reveal whether he would retire from international football.

Article Title: NFL Trade Rumors: Los Angeles Chargers and San Francisco 49ers emerge as top landing spots for $5M former Ravens WR
Article Text:
NFL Trade Rumors: Los Angeles Chargers and San Francisco 49ers emerge as top landing spots for $5M former Ravens WR(Getty Images)

Category



Details



Player Name



DeAndre Hopkins



Current Status



Free agent



Previous Team



Baltimore Ravens



Position



Wide receiver



Rumored Teams



Los Angeles Chargers, San Francisco 49ers



Last Contract



One year, $5 million with Baltimore



Career Earnings



Over $144 million



Latest Insider Update



CBS Sports and Last Word On Sports have linked Hopkins with multiple contenders





Which teams are interested in DeAndre Hopkins?



What are insiders saying about NFL trade rumors?

Contract details and financial implications

How could a potential trade impact both teams?

DeAndre Hopkins remains one of the biggest names available on the free-agent market as NFL training camps draw closer. The five-time All-Pro is taking his time before signing with a new team, hoping to join a contender with a realistic chance of competing deep into the postseason. While no agreement appears close, recent reports have connected the veteran receiver with several playoff hopefuls, including the Los Angeles Chargers and the San Francisco 49ers, as teams continue to assess their receiving depth ahead of the new season.The Los Angeles Chargers continue to search for more experience around quarterback Justin Herbert . Ladd McConkey has developed into one of Herbert's most reliable targets, but the rest of the receiving room still features several young players finding their footing. Tre Harris, KeAndre Lambert-Smith and Brenen Thompson all have upside, yet none has established himself as a proven NFL starter.Signing Hopkins would immediately give Herbert another dependable option on third downs and in the red zone. Even if the veteran no longer produces at the level he did earlier in his career, his route running and ball skills could help stabilize the passing game.San Francisco presents a different opportunity. The 49ers continue to deal with uncertainty surrounding Brandon Aiyuk, whose future has been the subject of NFL trade rumors throughout the offseason.If San Francisco eventually moves on from Aiyuk, adding Hopkins could provide Brock Purdy with another experienced target while allowing younger receivers to develop without carrying a heavier workload.CBS Sports' Bryan DeArdo recently identified the Buffalo Bills as one of the teams that could make sense for Hopkins, noting Buffalo's need for another experienced pass catcher before training camp. Anthony Palacios of Last Word On Sports also listed the Chargers and 49ers among the clubs that could benefit from adding the veteran receiver. His projection focuses on Hopkins joining a contender where he would complement an existing receiving group rather than serve as the clear No. 1 option.At this stage, there have been no reports of active negotiations, but league observers expect Hopkins to receive interest as training camp approaches.DeAndre Hopkins became an unrestricted free agent after completing a one-year, $5 million contract with the Baltimore Ravens. According to Spotrac, the entire deal was fully guaranteed. Across 13 NFL seasons, Hopkins has earned more than $144 million, giving him the flexibility to prioritize the right football situation instead of chasing the largest contract available.Because he is a free agent, any interested club can sign Hopkins without giving up draft picks or players in return. That makes him an attractive option for teams looking to strengthen their receiving corps without sacrificing future assets.His next contract is expected to be a short-term agreement, likely focused on immediate contention rather than a long-term commitment.For the Los Angeles Chargers, DeAndre Hopkins would provide veteran leadership alongside a young group of receivers. Justin Herbert has consistently performed at a high level despite changes around him, and another reliable target could make life easier in crucial passing situations. His presence would also reduce the pressure on younger receivers to contribute immediately.The fit in the San Francisco 49ers depends largely on Brandon Aiyuk's situation. If Aiyuk remains with the 49ers, Hopkins could rotate into Kyle Shanahan's offense and provide valuable depth. If Aiyuk is traded, the veteran could step into a much larger role alongside Ricky Pearsall and Christian Kirk, giving Brock Purdy another trusted receiver as the club continues to chase another Super Bowl appearance.DeAndre Hopkins has repeatedly indicated that winning remains his biggest priority at this stage of his career. With training camps only weeks away, contenders looking for one more experienced playmaker may soon decide the time is right to make their move. The Chargers and 49ers remain two of the teams worth watching as his free agency continues.
Article Summary: Nfl trade rumors: los angeles chargers and san francisco 49ers emerge as top landing spots for $5m former ravens wr deandre hopkins. The five-time all-pro is taking his time before signing with a new team, hoping to join a contender with a realistic chance of competing deep into the postseason.

Article Title: Lionel Messi's FIFA World Cup heroics leave wife Antonela Roccuzzo saying what Argentina fans could not put into words
Article Text:
Antonella Roccuzzo and Lionel Messi (Getty Images)

Why did Antonela Roccuzzo's message after Argentina's win resonate with so many fans?

Lionel Messi added another unforgettable chapter to his World Cup career on Tuesday as Argentina fought back from behind to edge Egypt 3-2 and secure a place in the quarterfinals. The captain scored twice, including a crucial late equalizer, as Argentina turned a tense contest into another memorable victory. While fans across the world celebrated yet another match-winning display, one reaction stood out. Antonela Roccuzzo, who has followed Messi's journey from his early days in Rosario to football's biggest stages, summed up the emotions of millions with a brief but heartfelt social media post after the final whistle.Antonela Roccuzzo did not need a lengthy tribute to explain what Messi had just produced. Instead, she shared a series of family photographs from inside Mercedes-Benz Stadium, where she watched the dramatic victory alongside their sons, Thiago, Mateo and Ciro. Dressed in Argentina shirts, the family celebrated another special night that added to Messi's remarkable World Cup story.The collection also featured one of the defining images from the evening, with Messi lifted into the air by his Argentina teammates after inspiring the comeback that sent the defending champions into the last eight.ID@undefinedCaption not available.ID@undefinedCaption not available.Her caption reflected the feeling of disbelief that surrounded the performance."Let's go Argentina. @leomessi no more words left," she wrote in Spanish, adding white and sky-blue heart emojis.For someone who has witnessed every milestone of Messi's career from close quarters, the message carried extra meaning. Roccuzzo has celebrated countless titles, records and individual awards over the years. Yet this time, even she suggested that words no longer felt enough to describe what her husband continues to achieve on football's biggest stage.She later shared more moments from the celebrations, including a family selfie with Mateo and Ciro and additional photographs from Argentina's emotional post-match scenes. The images offered supporters a rare look beyond the final whistle, showing how one of football's most famous families experienced another landmark night together.The emotional tribute followed another history-making display from the eight-time Ballon d'Or winner. Messi struck Argentina's equalizer in the 83rd minute before helping drive the late comeback. He also recorded the ninth World Cup assist of his career, adding yet another record to an already unmatched tournament résumé.Antonela Roccuzzo has made a habit of marking those milestones. After Messi scored his record-breaking 18th World Cup goal earlier in the tournament, she posted another heartfelt message that read, "What a privilege to see you make history again and again," followed by "Te amo."Those messages have become part of Argentina's World Cup journey. While Messi continues delivering defining moments on the pitch, Roccuzzo's quiet tributes have offered fans a personal window into the celebrations that unfold long after the stadium lights begin to fade.
Article Summary: Lionel messi scored twice as argentina beat egypt 3-2 to reach world cup quarterfinals. His wife, antonela roccuzzo, posted a heartfelt message on social media after the game. She shared a series of family photographs from inside mercedes-benz stadium.

Article Title: 'He will be one of the best captains of India': Shresta Iyer backs brother Shreyas Iyer after England hammering
Article Text:
Shresta Iyer and Shreyas Iyer

Tough start for captain Iyer



India face must-win fourth T20I



NEW DELHI: India's T20I captain Shreyas Iyer has received strong backing from his sister, Shresta Iyer, after another disappointing result against England in the 3rd T20I, extending his difficult start as the team's full-time captain.In a video that has gone viral on social media, Shresta urged fans not to judge her brother solely by recent defeats and expressed confidence that he would go on to become one of India's greatest captains."Shubman Gill ho, Virat Kohli toh … legend, Rohit Sharma legend … again, Sachin Tendulkar legend. Ye logon ne bhi kaafi saare matches lose kiye hain. But agar aap sirf Shreyas Iyer, Shreyas Iyer hi bolte rahoge, toh maybe aapko kuch to kuch to problem hai... but I feel that he is amazing.He is a very different personality ovreall. I think he has a lot to give. Unke jitna aur kisi ke paas nahi hai. Unke paas itna kuch dene ke liye hai. Aur coming time bahut jaldi aane wala hai, woh time bahut jaldi aayega, jab ye bolenge ki Shreyas Iyer is one of the best captains of India. I believe it is already happening," Shresta told Filmigyan.Her remarks come after India suffered their biggest-ever defeat by runs in T20Is, with England thrashing them by 125 runs in the third T20I.The heavy loss further compounded Iyer's struggles since taking over as India's full-time T20I captain in July.Iyer's first assignment as full-time captain came against Ireland, where India lost the two-match series 2-0.The ongoing England series has also not gone India's way. The opening T20I was washed out due to rain before India lost the second match by four wickets. The third T20I ended in a crushing 125-run defeat, leaving India trailing 0-2 in the five-match series.The numbers also paint a worrying picture.In his last 12 T20 matches as captain, Iyer has managed just one win while suffering 10 defeats. One match ended in no result.India now have little room for error in the series. Trailing 0-2, they must win the fourth T20I against England at the County Ground in Bristol on Thursday to keep the five-match series alive.
Article Summary: India's t20i captain shreyas iyer has received strong backing from his sister. Shresta iyer urged fans not to judge her brother solely by recent defeats. India suffered their biggest-ever defeat by runs in t20is, with england thrashing them by 125 runs.

Article Title: FIFA World Cup: Big blow for Morocco ahead of France quarter-final as Ismael Saibari ruled out
Article Text:
Ismael Saibari leaves the field after being injured during the round of 16 match against Canada. (AP Photo)

Ouahbi refuses to change Morocco's approach



France eye another deep World Cup run



Morocco's hopes of ending France's FIFA World Cup title charge have suffered a significant setback, with in-form forward Ismael Saibari ruled out of Thursday's blockbuster quarter-final because of a hamstring injury.Head coach Mohamed Ouahbi confirmed on the eve of the contest that the PSV Eindhoven star has failed to recover after picking up the injury during Morocco's 3-0 Round of 16 victory over Canada, depriving the Atlas Lions of one of their most influential players for the biggest game of their campaign."He's not ready but I hope it's not the end of the tournament for him," Ouahbi told reporters.Saibari has been one of Morocco's standout performers in the tournament, scoring in all three group-stage matches before converting the decisive penalty in the shootout victory over the Netherlands in the Round of 32. His absence leaves a major hole in Morocco's attack as they attempt to upset two-time world champions France and reach the World Cup semi-finals for the second consecutive tournament.Despite losing one of his key attacking weapons, Ouahbi insisted Morocco will not abandon the playing style that has carried them into the last eight."With regards to preparing for the match, there will not be any surprises. I have nothing to hide.I'm not somebody who is keen on surprises, and those of you who have analysed our games, you know that we have a clear idea of how we want to play," he said.The Moroccan coach stressed that patience in possession and intelligent movement would be crucial against Didier Deschamps' side."Of course, the key will be to hurt them when we have possession, but it's not only on the wings. We have to be patient with the ball, and to find where we can go through on the sides or in the centre. We've proven that we can hurt any team, and that's the goal," he added.The quarter-final is a rematch of the 2022 World Cup semi-final, where France ended Morocco's historic run with a 2-0 victory. However, Ouahbi believes both teams have evolved considerably since then."Every match is different. We have a different team, and we're going to face a different French team than the one from four years ago," he said.Rejecting suggestions that merely reaching the quarter-finals should satisfy his players, Ouahbi added: "France might be favourites, but we're going to do everything possible to win. Being at this stage is not a bonus. The bonus is to win the World Cup."France enter the clash in Foxborough with a perfect five-match record and are chasing a third successive FIFA World Cup semi-final appearance. Kylian Mbappe has led the charge with seven goals, while Ousmane Dembele , Michael Olise and Bradley Barcola complete a formidable attack.Deschamps warned against underestimating Morocco despite Saibari's absence."We met them four years ago in the semifinal. It is a really great, excellent team with top-notch individuals. They're not here to play. They're there to win," he said.The French coach also dismissed concerns over off-field controversies surrounding Mbappe, insisting, "Kylian is OK... He's just focused on tomorrow's game."Morocco, unbeaten in 10 matches since January's Africa Cup of Nations final, are still chasing a first-ever victory over France after four defeats and two draws in six previous meetings. The winners will face either Spain or Belgium in the semi-finals.
Article Summary: Ismael saibari ruled out of thursday's quarter-final with hamstring injury. Psv eindhoven star picked up the injury during morocco's 3-0 round of 16 victory over canada. Head coach mohamed ouahbi insists his side will not change their approach. France aiming to reach world cup semi-finals for second consecutive tournament.

Article Title: Tempers explode as Lionel Messi clashes with Egypt coach, staff member sent off in dramatic World Cup scenes | Watch
Article Text:
Tempers explode as Lionel Messi clashes with Egypt coach. (Video grabs)

Messi-Hassan confrontation sparks chaotic scenes



WATCH:

Egypt's frustration boils over



Argentina's thrilling FIFA World Cup Round of 16 victory over Egypt witnessed extraordinary scenes as Lionel Messi became involved in a heated confrontation with Egypt head coach Hossam Hassan before tempers boiled over on the touchline, culminating in a member of the Egyptian coaching staff being shown a red card after charging towards the Argentine captain.The dramatic sequence, which quickly went viral on social media, overshadowed Argentina's remarkable 3-2 comeback victory and has sparked fresh debate over FIFA's anti-racism protocol after Hassan was seen making the governing body's official crossed-arms "X" gesture during his exchange with Messi.The flashpoint came moments after the final whistle following a pulsating encounter in which Argentina recovered from 2-0 down to book their place in the quarter-finals.Videos circulating online show Messi walking towards Hassan before the pair exchanged words near the touchline. While the exact contents of the conversation remain unknown, the Egypt coach immediately responded by crossing his arms in an "X" shape — FIFA's official anti-racism signal introduced in 2024 to report alleged racist abuse and activate the competition's three-step anti-discrimination protocol.No audio from the exchange has been released and neither FIFA nor the Egyptian Football Association has clarified whether Hassan's gesture was directed specifically at Messi, Argentina's bench, the match officials or another incident occurring around the technical area.The confrontation quickly escalated as several Egyptian coaching staff members rushed towards the scene, with one visibly losing his temper before charging aggressively towards Messi.Argentina players immediately surrounded their captain, while match officials, security personnel and other Egyptian staff intervened to prevent the situation from escalating further. The furious Egyptian staff member was eventually shown a red card and escorted away as both benches attempted to restore order.The ugly scenes reflected Egypt's lingering frustration after surrendering a two-goal lead in heartbreaking fashion.Hossam Hassan's side appeared on course for one of the biggest upsets of the tournament after first-half and second-half strikes had stunned the defending champions. However, Cristian Romero ignited Argentina's comeback before Messi equalised in the 83rd minute. Enzo Fernandez then completed the turnaround with a stoppage-time winner.Egypt's anger had already been building after a crucial Mostafa Ziko goal was ruled out following a VAR review for a foul in the build-up. The African side also believed they should have been awarded a penalty for an alleged tug on Hamdy Fathy shortly before Argentina launched the attack that produced the decisive goal.Speaking after the defeat, Hassan launched a scathing attack on the officiating."I’m not convinced with this outcome. I’m not convinced with the way things unfolded during this match," he said. "We have been treated unfairly today. We have suffered injustice."The Egyptian coach even suggested he would not watch another match at the tournament following his team's elimination.
Article Summary: Argentina came from 2-0 down to beat egypt 3-2 in world cup round of 16. Lionel messi clashed with egypt head coach hossam hassan on touchline. Egyptian coaching staff member was shown a red card after charging towards messi. Hassan was seen making fifa's official crossed-arms "x" gesture.

Article Title: FIFA World Cup 2026 quarterfinal schedule: Full fixtures, match timings, venues and semifinal pathway
Article Text:
Kylian Mbappé, Erling Haaland, Harry Kane and Lionel Messi (Agency Image)

FIFA World Cup 2026 quarterfinal schedule

Date Day Match Venue IST Time July 10 Friday France vs Morocco Gillette Stadium, Foxborough 1:30 AM July 11 Saturday Spain vs Belgium SoFi Stadium, Inglewood 12:30 AM July 12 Sunday Norway vs England Hard Rock Stadium, Miami Gardens 2:30 AM July 12 Sunday Argentina vs Switzerland Arrowhead Stadium, Kansas City 6:30 AM

The FIFA World Cup 2026 has reached its business end, with only eight teams remaining in the race for football's biggest prize. Following a dramatic Round of 16 that produced several memorable contests and major upsets, attention now turns to the quarterfinals, where four high-stakes clashes will decide this year's semifinalists.The knockout stage has already delivered plenty of drama. Norway eliminated five-time champions Brazil with a 2-1 victory, while Spain edged past Portugal thanks to Mikel Merino's stoppage-time winner. Defending champions Argentina also survived a major scare before fighting back to beat Egypt 3-2.The quarterfinal action begins on Friday with France taking on Morocco at Gillette Stadium in Foxborough. France booked their place with a hard-fought 1-0 victory over Paraguay, while Morocco impressed with a commanding 3-0 win over co-hosts Canada in Houston.Spain and Belgium will contest the second quarterfinal on Saturday. Belgium advanced after defeating the United States 4-1, while Spain head into the contest having yet to concede a goal in the tournament.Sunday features two blockbuster fixtures. Erling Haaland's Norway will face Harry Kane-led England after knocking Brazil out in the previous round, while England edged Mexico 3-2 to secure their place in the last eight.The final quarterfinal sees defending champions Argentina meet Switzerland. Switzerland progressed after defeating Colombia in a dramatic penalty shootout.The four quarterfinals will be played across four stadiums in the United States: Gillette Stadium in Foxborough, SoFi Stadium in Inglewood, Hard Rock Stadium in Miami Gardens and Arrowhead Stadium in Kansas City.The winners of France vs Morocco and Spain vs Belgium will meet in the first semifinal on July 14 at AT&T Stadium in Arlington.The second semifinal will feature the winners of Norway vs England and Argentina vs Switzerland, with a place in the FIFA World Cup 2026 final at stake.
Article Summary: The fifa world cup 2026 has reached its business end, with only eight teams remaining in the race for football's biggest prize. The quarterfinal action begins on friday with france taking on morocco at gillette stadium in foxborough. Spain and belgium will contest the second quarterfinal on saturday.

Article Title: Maple Leafs linked to shocking William Nylander move that could completely reshape Toronto’s Stanley Cup ambitions
Article Text:
Maple Leafs may be preparing an unexpected William Nylander decision (Getty Images)

Why are the Maple Leafs considering William Nylander alongside Auston Matthews?



The Toronto Maple Leafs have spent much of the offseason reshaping their roster, but one of their biggest changes this season may not involve a new signing at all. Instead, it could come from a decision that has been debated for years: moving William Nylander back alongside Auston Matthews. Despite being one of Toronto's most productive forwards, Nylander has largely remained away from Matthews at even strength in recent seasons. Now, with a refreshed forward group and new combinations available, that long-discussed reunion appears to be a genuine option as the Maple Leafs search for a lineup capable of making a deeper playoff run.The idea is simple, but its impact could be significant.According to The Athletic's NHL analyst Jonas Siegel, the most obvious answer could also be the right one when it comes to filling Matthews' wing.“The simplest answer to this question might just be the right one: Nylander, the best winger on the team,” Siegel wrote. “Does playing Matthews and Nylander together make the Leafs too top-heavy? It might, especially if McKenna is there too. Do Matthews and Nylander still make sense together?“Remember, these two started their NHL careers on the same line — when Hiller was on Mike Babcock’s staff. Their connection, however, has grown duller over the years, perhaps because they simply stopped playing together regularly, first under Sheldon Keefe but especially under Berube.Hiller should be more open to the possibility.”Toronto knows exactly what Nylander brings. His speed, puck control and finishing ability make him one of the league's most dangerous offensive players. Pairing him with Matthews would instantly give the Maple Leafs a line capable of matching up against any opponent.The projected top six suggested by Siegel would feature McKenna, Matthews and Nylander on the first line, with Matthew Knies, John Tavares and Cowan forming the second unit. It creates a formidable first line, but it also raises questions about scoring depth. If Matthews' line is contained, Toronto could find itself relying on a second unit that may not carry the same offensive punch as previous seasons.Still, Nylander's production makes the gamble understandable. Entering the third season of his eight-year, $92 million contract, he delivered 30 goals and 49 assists for 79 points in just 65 games last season. Few players on the roster can match that level of consistency.Toronto's aggressive offseason also suggests the organization is far from satisfied. The club strengthened several areas, including signing star goaltender Sergei Bobrovsky, yet management continues to look for ways to raise the team's ceiling.General manager John Chayka made that philosophy clear.“Purely philosophically, I think a general manager’s job is to star-hunt, first and foremost. This game can be changed by a few top players making a big impact on a franchise, so the depth piece matters, how you fill out a roster, how you manage the cap, that’s all necessary but not maybe sufficient,” Chayka said.“I think about the role of the general manager and their ability to go out and big-game hunt and I think that’s kind of priority No. 1.”Whether Toronto adds another marquee name or not, the decision to reunite Matthews and Nylander could become one of the defining storylines of the season. It offers elite offensive potential, but it also tests how much balance the Maple Leafs are willing to sacrifice in pursuit of a stronger attack.
Article Summary: The toronto maple leafs have spent the offseason reshaping their roster. One of their biggest changes could come from a decision that has been debated for years: moving william nylander back alongside auston matthews. Despite being one of toronto's most productive forwards, nylander has largely remained away from matthews at even strength in recent seasons.

Article Title: Lewis Hamilton and Kim Kardashian spotted chilling in Idaho, Kendall Jenner and Jacob Elordi join lakeside holiday after British Grand Prix
Article Text:
Lewis Hamilton and Kim Kardashian are in Arizona. (Image credit: Instagram)

Lewis Hamilton and Kim Kardashian unwind in Idaho after British Grand Prix



After the British Grand Prix, Lewis Hamilton and Kim Kardashian have once again become the centre of attention. Instead of making headlines from the racetrack or the red carpet, the pair grabbed attention with a relaxing holiday in Idaho. They were spotted spending time by the lake alongside Kendall Jenner Khloe Kardashian and actor Jacob Elordi , with photos and videos from the trip quickly going viral.The vacation comes at a time when Hamilton and Kardashian continue to face intense public interest over their relationship. At the same time, social media rumours claimed Kim had unfollowed the Ferrari driver, leading to fresh breakup speculation. However, those claims have since been dismissed, shifting the focus back to the group’s peaceful lakeside escape.Lewis Hamilton appears to be making the most of his time away from Formula 1 following the British Grand Prix. The Ferrari driver was seen enjoying a holiday in Coeur d’Alene, Idaho, with Kim Kardashian, Kendall Jenner, Khloe Kardashian and Jacob Elordi.Photos and videos from the trip showed the celebrity group boating on the lake, spending time on a private dock and relaxing at a large waterfront property. The outing offered a quiet break from their busy schedules after weeks filled with racing, business commitments and public appearances.Hamilton and Kardashian have attracted significant attention in recent months after they were seen together several times, including around the Super Bowl earlier this year. While they have kept much of their relationship private, their latest vacation has once again placed them in the spotlight.Recently, fans discussed the rumours suggesting Kim Kardashian had unfollowed Hamilton on social media. The speculation spread quickly after posts on X claimed the pair had split. Some suggested it was because Hamilton had not moved on from a previous relationship involving Kendall Jenner.However, those claims were inaccurate. Kim Kardashian and Lewis Hamilton were never following each other on social media. Hamilton has followed only his business-related accounts for several years after removing personal follows from his profile. As a result, there was no “unfollow” to begin with.The rumours sparked mixed reactions online. While some users believed the claims, many others pointed out that the story did not match the facts. Several fans noted that it was impossible to use social media activity as proof of a breakup when neither celebrity had been following the other in the first place.Before the British Grand Prix, Hamilton also spoke briefly about his personal life during a media session. When asked whether his positive mood was linked to a new relationship, he steered the conversation toward Ferrari. He said he was enjoying being part of the famous Formula 1 team and praised the warm welcome he had received since joining, choosing not to discuss his private life in detail.Hamilton has previously admitted that balancing racing and relationships is difficult.
Article Summary: Lewis hamilton and kim kardashian are on holiday in coeur d'alene, idaho. The pair were spotted spending time with kendall jenner, khloe kardashian and actor jacob elordi. The vacation comes at a time when hamilton and kardashian continue to face intense public interest over their relationship.

Article Title: From Queen Camilla to England Rugby World Cup winner Lewis Moody: Wimbledon Royal Box Day 10 packed with A-List celebrities
Article Text:
Image credits: Getty Images World No. 3 Alexander Zverev accuses Tennis Channel of disrespect as Italian Open meltdown sparks fresh controversy (Image via Getty) Image credits: Getty Images World No. 3 Alexander Zverev accuses Tennis Channel of disrespect as Italian Open meltdown sparks fresh controversy (Image via Getty) Image credits: Getty Images 1

2

Who is in the Wimbledon Royal Box on Day 10?



Wimbledon 2026 continues to attract some of the biggest names from sport, entertainment and public life. Day 10 of the Championships features a packed Royal Box as fans prepare for an exciting day of quarter-final action on Centre Court. Queen Camilla headlines the list of distinguished guests watching the action from one of the most exclusive seats in world sport.The day promises thrilling tennis alongside a star-studded audience. British wildcard Arthur Fery looks to continue his dream run against Italy’s Flavio Cobolli, while Marta Kostyuk takes on Jasmine Paolini in the women’s singles quarter-finals. As always, the Royal Box is expected to be almost as much of a talking point as the matches themselves.Queen Camilla leads an impressive guest list at the All England Club on Wednesday. The Royal Box has welcomed royalty, politicians, sporting icons and famous actors throughout this year’s Championships, and Day 10 is no different.Among the well-known names in attendance are England cricket star Joe Root, survival expert Bear Grylls, Hollywood actress Elle Fanning, British actress Emily Mortimer , actor Jason Isaacs, and former Wimbledon champion Richard Krajicek.Former Chancellor George Osborne, former Labour strategist Alastair Campbell, television legend David Suchet, actor Dominic West, comedian and filmmaker Armando Iannucci, Olympic rowing great Dame Katherine Grainger, England Rugby World Cup winner Lewis Moody, V&A Museum director Tristram Hunt, opera singer Bryn Terfel, and comedian Grace Campbell are also among the invited guests.The Royal Box has remained one of the biggest attractions away from the courts throughout Wimbledon 2026. During the opening week, football icon David Beckham attended alongside his mother Sandra Beckham. Sprint legend Usain Bolt also made an appearance. While former UK Prime Minister Rishi Sunak watched matches despite using crutches.The Championships also welcomed Catherine, Princess of Wales, whose appearance delighted spectators earlier in the tournament. Other famous faces seen during the fortnight include tennis legend Roger Federer, actor Benedict Cumberbatch , Judy Murray, and Ncuti Gatwa.The Royal Box remains one of the most exclusive areas at Wimbledon. Although guests do not pay for their seats, attendance is strictly by invitation. Tickets cannot be purchased, regardless of wealth or celebrity status.Invitations are issued by Deborah Jevans, Chair of the All England Club. The guest list is carefully selected and usually includes members of the Royal Family, heads of state, senior political figures, former Wimbledon champions, distinguished athletes and individuals who have made significant contributions to public life or maintain close ties with the Championships.Being invited also comes with expectations. Guests are required to follow a formal dress code that reflects the tradition of the tournament. Men are generally expected to wear suits or jackets with ties. While women are encouraged to wear elegant daywear suitable for the prestigious occasion.The Centre Court is hosting two major quarter-finals and yet another packed Royal Box.
Article Summary: Queen camilla leads an impressive guest list at the all england club on wednesday. The royal box has remained one of the biggest attractions away from the courts throughout wimbledon 2026. Guests are required to follow a formal dress code that reflects the tradition of the tournament.

Article Title: Sophie Cunningham shares eye-catching beach moments with 6-foot-2 Fever teammate
Article Text:
Sophie Cunningham and Lexie Hull. Image via: Kate Frese/ NBAE via Getty Images

Sophie Cunningham turns heads in bikini beach photos with Fever teammate Lexie Hull

Fans react to Sophie Cunningham and Lexie Hull's beach moment

Sophie Cunningham's Fever status

Sophie Cunningham. Image via: Erica Denhoff/ Icon Sportswire via Getty Images

Sophie Cunningham and Lexie Hull enjoyed a relaxing day at Manhattan Beach during the Indiana Fever's West Coast road trip, offering fans a glimpse into their close friendship ahead of Wednesday's WNBA game against the Los Angeles Sparks. The beach outing came after Indiana's convincing 84-68 victory over the Las Vegas Aces, giving the team a brief opportunity to recharge before returning to action.The social media post quickly gained attention among WNBA fans, not only because of the pair's beach photos but also because Cunningham and Hull have become two of the Fever's most recognizable personalities off the court.Hull shared a selfie with Cunningham on her Instagram Story from Manhattan Beach, California, where both guards spent part of their day off soaking up the sun before Indiana resumed its demanding travel schedule. Cunningham later reshared the image, adding to the buzz surrounding the post.Hull wore a pastel-striped triangle bikini with bright pink trim, while Cunningham opted for a geometric-patterned triangle bikini. The two lay side by side on the sand, enjoying what Hull described in her caption as "much needed r&r."The outing followed another productive performance from both players during Sunday's win over Las Vegas.Cunningham scored nine points off the bench, knocking down three shots from beyond the arc, while Hull continued her strong run as a starter with 10 points, four rebounds and two steals in 22 minutes.The Fever improved to 12-8 with that victory, marking their second straight win after defeating the Los Angeles Sparks 111-87 on June 27. Indiana now sits firmly in the playoff picture while navigating one of the busiest stretches of its schedule.Hull previously appeared on Cunningham's offseason podcast, and Cunningham has often praised her teammate publicly. Together, they have become fan favorites, with many supporters affectionately referring to them as the Fever's "mermaids."The beach selfie quickly circulated across social media after being reposted by fan accounts, prompting hundreds of reactions from supporters.Some fans joked about the security surrounding the players during the outing."I see security is staying out of sight. Lol!" one fan wrote.Another added, "I bet Lex fiancé is there for security."Others focused on the ongoing online conversation surrounding the Fever."lol so now you like these two because you think they aren’t hanging out with Caitlin Clark in that moment? But as soon as they’re back on court backing up their teammate, the racial hate and insults start up again," another user posted.One response defended the lighthearted nature of the interactions between Cunningham and Clark."You don’t seem to grasp the irony or humor. Sophie calls CC pale as a joke. You sound humorless and missing the point."Another fan added a humorous observation."Feel bad for the body guards standing on the beach in suits protecting these two."Cunningham's fanbase is always ready to create a buzz.While Cunningham's social media presence often grabs headlines, her production has been equally valuable for Indiana this season.The veteran guard has quietly delivered one of the best campaigns of her career after re-signing with the Fever during the offseason. Through 19 games, Cunningham is averaging 9.5 points, 2.5 rebounds and 1.4 assists while shooting 49.1 percent from the field and an impressive 42.9 percent from three-point range.Despite those numbers, Cunningham was left off the WNBA All-Star reserve list when the league announced its 12 selections on Tuesday. The omission means the 29-year-old is still searching for her first All-Star appearance after eight seasons.Cunningham has reached double figures nine times this season, including a season-high 24-point performance against the Toronto Tempo on June 16 and a 17-point outing against the Seattle Storm earlier in the year.
Article Summary: Sophie cunningham and lexie hull enjoyed a relaxing day at manhattan beach, california. The pair shared a selfie on instagram, which quickly went viral. The beach outing came after indiana's convincing 84-68 victory over the las vegas aces. Cunningham and hull have become two of the fever's most recognizable personalities off the court.

Article Title: Stephen A. Smith and Draymond Green's feud explained: What sparked the latest beef?
Article Text:
Stephen A. Smith and Draymond Green. Image via: Arturo Holmes/ Getty Images | Justin Ford/Getty Images

How did Stephen A. Smith and Draymond Green's latest feud start?



Stephen A. Smith and Draymond Green have a long history



What happens next between Stephen A. Smith and Draymond Green?



Draymond Green has reignited his long-running friction with Stephen A. Smith, this time questioning whether the ESPN personality deserves to call himself a journalist at all. Green made the comments while appearing on Jemele Hill's podcast this week, tying his criticism directly to how Smith has covered Boston Celtics star Jaylen Brown during trade rumors and reporting built on anonymous sources.The comments arrive during an already chaotic stretch for Brown, who was traded to the Philadelphia 76ers for Paul George and multiple draft picks roughly a week ago. That trade set off a chain reaction across NBA media, and Green's remarks are the latest flashpoint in it.The dispute traces back to how Smith and other media figures characterized Brown around the trade. Reports citing unnamed sources questioned Brown's demeanor and value, prompting pushback from players including LeBron James and Austin Rivers. Brown has separately accused Smith of leaning on "clickbait" tactics after Smith aired an anonymous message criticizing his personality.Green picked up that thread with Hill, arguing Smith invokes the "journalist" label without doing the legwork that comes with it. "He throws out the journalist tag all the time," Green said, adding that real accountability means showing up in person the way a beat writer would. He argued that pattern is part of why athletes have grown skeptical of media credibility across the league.Separately, Green also defended Brown's intelligence after Colin Cowherd suggested on his show that Brown's self-regard bordered on a "disease."Green called that framing absurd, saying Jaylen Brown is "brilliant" and pushing back on the idea that confidence should be treated as a flaw.This isn't the first time the two have clashed. In 2024, Green criticized Smith on Shaquille O'Neal's podcast for how Smith discussed his indefinite suspension after striking Phoenix center Jusuf Nurkic, saying Smith failed to separate the person from the player. Smith fired back on First Take, listing years of on-air support for Green and saying he wished Green had called him privately instead of going public.In 2025, Green weighed in again after LeBron James confronted Smith at a Lakers game over comments about James' son, Bronny. Green called Smith's remarks about fatherhood out of bounds, saying criticizing James "as a father" crossed a line Smith wouldn't cross face to face.Smith has not yet addressed Green's latest comments directly, but the pattern between the two suggests a response is likely given how consistently they've traded public jabs over the past two years. Brown, meanwhile, remains at the center of the broader anonymous-sourcing debate as he begins his new chapter in Philadelphia, and how Smith frames that coverage going forward may determine whether this specific dispute with Green cools down or escalates again.
Article Summary: Draymond green questioned whether stephen a. smith deserves to call himself a journalist. Green made the comments while appearing on jemele hill's podcast this week. He tied his criticism directly to how smith has covered boston celtics star jaylen brown.

Article Title: NFL Trade Rumors: Carolina Panthers and Indianapolis Colts emerge as top landing spots for $5 million Cleveland Browns star
Article Text:
NFL Trade Rumors: Carolina Panthers and Indianapolis Colts emerge as top landing spots for $5 million Browns QB(Getty Images)

Which teams are interested in Shedeur Sanders?

Category



Details

Shedeur Sanders

Cleveland Browns

Carolina Panthers, Indianapolis Colts

Latest Insider Update



Anthony Palacios proposed the Panthers and Colts as possible trade destinations



Potential Return



Late-round draft pick or player swap





What are insiders saying about the NFL trade rumors?

Contract details and salary cap implications



How a potential trade could impact both teams

Shedeur Sanders has once again become a talking point in the latest NFL trade rumors as the Cleveland Browns prepare for training camp with a crowded quarterback room. While the Browns have shown no indication they are actively shopping the former Colorado star, speculation continues after Last Word on Sports' Anthony Palacios explored several hypothetical trade scenarios involving the young quarterback. Among the probable destinations, the Carolina Panthers and Indianapolis Colts stand out as two teams that could at least monitor Sanders' situation if Cleveland decides to entertain offers later this season.The Carolina Panthers could become an interesting landing spot if questions resurface around Bryce Young during the 2026 season. Carolina exercised Young's fifth-year option, but the organization has yet to commit to a long-term extension. Kenny Pickett also joined the quarterback room this offseason on a one-year deal, giving the Panthers another experienced option behind Young.Palacios suggested Carolina could explore Shedeur Sanders if injuries or inconsistent quarterback play create a need during the season. Rather than immediately competing for the starting job, Sanders would arrive as a developmental quarterback with upside while providing Carolina another long-term option at the position.The Indianapolis Colts have also been linked through Palacios' proposed scenarios.Daniel Jones enters 2026 looking to rebound after last year's injury, while Anthony Richardson's future remains uncertain after an inconsistent start to his NFL career. Palacios suggested the two teams could even explore a quarterback swap involving Richardson and Sanders if both organizations decide a change of scenery benefits their young passers. Also, Indianapolis continues to have one of the league's more unsettled quarterback situations entering training camp.Anthony Palacios recently outlined three trade destinations for Shedeur Sanders while discussing the Cleveland Browns crowded quarterback room. According to Palacios, moving Sanders before the season would be unusual given his promising rookie campaign and affordable contract. He also noted that trading the former Colorado quarterback after just one season would make little sense unless the Browns become convinced that Deshaun Watson and Dillon Gabriel provide a better long-term path.Among the suggested landing spots, Carolina and Indianapolis were highlighted because of the uncertainty surrounding Bryce Young and Daniel Jones, respectively. The report stressed that any serious trade discussions would likely depend on how each team's quarterback room performs during training camp and the regular season rather than happening immediately.Shedeur Sanders is entering the second season of the four-year, $4.65 million rookie contract he signed after being selected in the fifth round of the 2025 NFL Draft. According to Spotrac, he will earn a $1.005 million base salary in 2026 while carrying a cap hit of $1.12 million. His deal includes $447,380 in guaranteed money, and he remains under team control through the 2028 season before becoming an unrestricted free agent in 2029.The contract is one of Sanders' biggest advantages as a trade asset. Any acquiring team would add a young quarterback on an inexpensive rookie deal without creating significant salary cap concerns. For Cleveland, that affordability also reduces any urgency to move him. The Browns can continue developing Sanders while evaluating the rest of their quarterback room before making any long-term decision.From the Cleveland Browns perspective, trading Sanders would only become realistic if another quarterback clearly separates himself during training camp or the regular season. The Browns invested a fifth-round pick in Sanders and still control his contract for three more seasons, giving them little reason to rush into a deal unless the return exceeds expectations.The Carolina Panthers present an intriguing fit because of the uncertainty surrounding Bryce Young's long-term future. If Young struggles to build on last season's progress, Sanders could provide another developmental option without forcing the Panthers to spend premium draft capital on another quarterback.The Indianapolis Colts face similar questions. Daniel Jones is returning from injury, and Anthony Richardson has yet to fully establish himself as the franchise quarterback. Adding Sanders would give the Colts another young passer to evaluate while keeping future financial flexibility intact.At this stage, NFL trade rumors involving Shedeur Sanders remain speculative rather than imminent. Still, with training camp approaching and quarterback competitions set to unfold across the league, the Carolina Panthers and Indianapolis Colts could become teams worth monitoring if Cleveland eventually decides to explore the market for its young quarterback.
Article Summary: Nfl trade rumors: carolina panthers and indianapolis colts emerge as top landing spots for $5 million browns qb. Shedeur sanders has once again become a talking point in the latest nfl trade rumors. Cleveland browns have shown no indication they are actively shopping the former colorado star.

Article Title: Why did Ed Sheeran secretly visit England's World Cup camp in Kansas? Real reason explained
Article Text:
Ed Sheeran with England team. Image via: England/ YouTube

England receives surprise boost as Ed Sheeran makes secret World Cup camp visit



How the Mexico win set up a Norway showdown

What comes next for England



Stage



Date



Match

8:00 p.m.





Ed Sheeran made a secret visit to England's World Cup base in Kansas City last week, performing an acoustic set for Thomas Tuchel's squad days before their 3-2 Round of 16 win over Mexico. The England team released footage of the gig on their app Tuesday, showing the 35-year-old singer playing "Castle on the Hill" for players and staff during downtime.The visit is the latest chapter in a friendship between Sheeran and the squad that goes back five years, and it lands at a pivotal moment as England prepare for a quarterfinal against Norway.Sheeran's appearance was not a one-off. He first joined the squad during the delayed Euro 2020 tournament in 2021, an arrangement captain Harry Kane set up personally. He has returned for major tournaments since, including a visit ahead of England's 2024 European Championship quarterfinal against Switzerland. Sheeran, a lifelong Ipswich Town fan who owns a minority stake in the club, described the relationship as an easy fit with the squad, saying the atmosphere among the players has never felt like "a tough crowd" to perform for.England's path to the quarterfinals has not been simple. They beat DR Congo 2-1 in the Round of 32 despite conceding an early goal, then delivered a statement result against Mexico at Estadio Azteca, becoming the first team ever to beat Mexico in Mexico City at a World Cup.That win booked a quarterfinal date with Norway in Miami on July 12, a matchup that pits Kane, who has scored six goals this tournament, against Norway's Erling Haaland, who has scored seven. Jude Bellingham has added four goals of his own as England chase a first World Cup title since 1966.England flew back to Kansas City on Monday and used the day for recovery before shifting focus to Norway. Sheeran, for his part, is already looking further ahead. Asked to predict the final, he said, "I think it'll be an England-France final." Article Summary: England beat mexico 3-2 to reach the world cup quarterfinals. They will face norway in miami on saturday night. Ed sheeran made a secret visit to england's world cup base in kansas city last week. The 35-year-old singer played an acoustic set for players and staff during downtime.
